untranslatable_reason: Symmetric triangle pattern detection requires geometric pattern recognition (identifying converging trend lines, support/resistance levels, and apex formation) which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires identifying the triangle formation itself, which cannot be expressed through standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate the downtrend context and downward breakout using ADX > 25 (confirming strong downtrend) and price crossing below SMA_20 (approximating downward breakout). However, the core requirement of detecting a symmetric triangle pattern formation cannot be accurately represented without pattern recognition capabilities. A more precise implementation would require custom pattern detection logic external to standard indicators.
